name: .NET Framework 4.5
description: The.NET Framework 4.5 test measures knowledge of .NET environment. Designed for experienced users, this test covers Application Development, Application Foundation, Data Modeling, Deployment, Diagnostics, Performance, Portability, and Security.

name: .NET MVC (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Model-View-Controller (MVC) architecture, validation, security, routing, and areas.

name: .NET WCF (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of .NET fundamentals, WCF architecture, programming model, SOA, managing and programming WCF.

name: AI Skills
description: The AI Skills assessment measures the skills that help candidates successfully leverage AI in their work.

name: Amazon Web Services (AWS) Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of AWS delivery process, monitoring, metrics, logging, security, validation and scalability.

name: Android Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of UI components for an Android device, services and alerts, animation and media apps, application components, security and testing.

name: Angular 6 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of basic components and modules of Angular 6, data binding, dependency injection, CRUD with HTTP, typescript, routing and navigation.

name: AngularJS (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of AngularJS architecture, forms, directives, filters, controllers, routing and testing.

name: Apache Hadoop (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of basic concepts of Hadoop, commands, HDFS and MapReduce.

name: Apache Spark (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Apache Spark principles, RDD operations, lineage graphs and lazy evaluation.

name: ASP .NET with C# (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of .NET framework and controls, C# fundamentals, OOPs concepts and advanced topics such as data access components, state management and security services.

name: Automata Front End
description: Simulation based test that measures front-end development capabilities using HTML, CSS, and JavaScript with a live output section, manually scored.

name: Automata (New)
description: An AI-powered coding simulation assessment that evaluates programming ability with a familiar IDE across 40+ languages, using real-world coding problems.

name: Automata Selenium
description: A coding simulation assessment that evaluates the ability to conduct automation testing tasks using Selenium scripts.

name: Agile Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of tools, techniques and processes involved in the Agile testing methodology.

name: Manual Testing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the software testing life cycle, testing tools and techniques, design of test cases and generation of test reports.

name: Selenium (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Selenium IDE, Selenium RC, Selenium grid, web driver, test design considerations, user extensions, frameworks and object repository.

name: RESTful Web Services (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of REST features, architecture, handling requests, producing responses, entity translation, security, filters, and interceptors.

name: Node.js (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures basic knowledge of Node.js such as events, streams, file system, error handling, concurrency, DB handling and express framework.

name: Java 8 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Java class design, exceptions, generics, collections, concurrency, JDBC and Java I/O fundamentals.

name: Core Java (Advanced Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, files and exception handling, and advanced Java concepts like generics, collections, threads, strings and concurrency.

name: Core Java (Entry Level) (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of basic Java constructs, OOP concepts, file handling, exception handling, threads, generic class and inner class.

name: Java Design Patterns (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the types of design patterns in Java and principles like threads and refactoring used in Java design patterns.

name: Java Frameworks (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of different Java frameworks - Struts, Hibernate and Spring.

name: Spring (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Spring core, AOP, IOC container and transactions.

name: Hibernate (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Hibernate architecture, Hibernate mapping and Hibernate query language(HQL).

name: SQL (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of SQL queries, data manipulation and transaction processing.

name: SQL Server (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of basic SQL queries, creating and altering tables, filtering, grouping, aggregation in SQL and querying multiple tables.

name: Automata - SQL (New)
description: A simulated query writing test that measures the ability to write SQL queries to perform DDL, DML and DCL tasks.

name: Python (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Python programming, databases, modules and library.

name: JavaScript (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of programming in the JavaScript language and its application in front-end development.

name: ReactJS (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the technical knowledge of React APIs, render function, JSX, form validation and styling.

name: CSS3 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of CSS3 and its application in providing style to web documents.

name: HTML/CSS (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of HTML to create a user interface and CSS to stylize it.

name: HTML5 (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of HTML5 and its application in creating a user interface.

name: Cloud Computing (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of cloud computing concepts, cloud service models, virtualization and private clouds.

name: Docker (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Docker container, data management, Docker performance and swarm.

name: Kubernetes (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of the architecture, cluster and services of Kubernetes.

name: Microservices (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Microservices architecture, SOA, and Microservices patterns.

name: Linux Administration (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of the Linux operating system and its application in system administration and network administration.

name: GIT (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of how to use GIT for version control.

name: Jenkins (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of Jenkins configuration and deployment, plugins, nodes, build jobs and testing.

name: Salesforce Development (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of Salesforce platform, design and data models, business logic, data management and analytics.

name: Data Science (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the conceptual knowledge on how to use machine learning to analyze data, extract information, draw conclusions and make statistically-driven decisions.

name: R Programming (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the knowledge of R programming and its application in statistics.

name: Basic Statistics (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of statistical methods, exploratory analysis, basics of probability, standard distributions and statistical testing.

name: MS Excel (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the ability to use MS Excel to maintain, organize, analyze and present numeric data.

name: Microsoft Excel 365 - Essentials (New)
description: Simulation evaluating ability to perform operations in MS Excel: formulas and functions, analyzing data, formatting, managing workbooks, presenting data visually, printing, sharing and securing workbooks.

name: MS Word (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures the ability to use MS Word to record and save textual information.

name: MS PowerPoint (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of MS PowerPoint toolbars, slide layouts, animation, slideshow, slide designs and formats.

name: Microsoft Outlook 2013 (adaptive)
description: Measures knowledge of Microsoft Outlook 2013 including application management, contacts, mail management, notes, printing, schedules and calendars, security and tasks.

name: Data Entry (New)
description: Simulated data entry test that measures the ability to accurately transcribe data from pre-filled forms and the ability to verify pre-filled data.

name: Typing (New)
description: Typing based test that evaluates typing speed and accuracy.

name: English Comprehension (New)
description: Multiple-choice test that measures vocabulary, grammar and reading comprehension skills.

name: Reading Comprehension v2
description: Provides a general measure of English reading comprehension using passages and questions on themes, mood and specific facts.

name: Written English v1
description: Measures knowledge of US English grammar and reading comprehension for those with English as a second language.

name: Business Communication (adaptive)
description: Measures knowledge of communicating in the workplace: electronic communication, employment communication, listening, meetings, nonverbal and verbal communication, written communication.

name: Interpersonal Communications
description: Measures knowledge of employing effective verbal and non-verbal communication and managing conflicts, covering group and intercultural communication, listening and technology in communication.

name: Time Management (U.S.)
description: Measures knowledge of using time wisely in the workplace: action plans, controlling, decision making, organizing, planning, scheduling, and time wasters.

name: Multitasking Ability
description: A face-valid split-screen simulation measuring the ability to work on more than one task simultaneously while maintaining efficiency, combining problem-solving items with an email inbox.

name: Occupational Personality Questionnaire OPQ32r
description: One of the most widely used and respected measures of workplace behavioural style in the world, providing a clear framework for understanding the impact of personality on job performance across 32 dimensions.

name: Motivation Questionnaire MQM5
description: Measures 18 dimensions of an individual's motivation, providing understanding of situations that increase and reduce motivation to help managers direct energies more constructively.

name: Global Skills Assessment
description: Measures 96 discrete skills/behaviors aligned to SHL's Universal Competency Framework (UCF), based on self-reported behaviors a person currently engages in at work.

name: Global Skills Development Report
description: Given to individuals who completed the Global Skills Assessment (GSA); offers a complete overview of current skills across the Great 8 Domains with tips on leveraging top strengths and developing growth skills.

name: Verify - Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided, identify strengths and weaknesses of arguments, and complete scenarios using incomplete information.

name: Verify - Inductive Reasoning (2014)
description: Used for jobs at all levels that require logical reasoning ability such as dealing with new concepts, answering 'why' and 'how', and resolving complex, ambiguous problems.

name: Verify - Numerical Ability
description: Measures the ability to derive numerical problems from written problems, calculate answers to numerical equations, and work with numerical data in a realistic workplace context.

name: Verify - Verbal Ability - Next Generation
description: Measures the ability to read written passages and comprehend text, interpret tone and author intent, identify main ideas, and predict author responses.

name: Verify - G+
description: Part of the Verify suite of cognitive ability tests, measuring Numerical, Deductive, and Inductive ability with 30 questions across the three abilities. Appropriate for all job levels.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Numerical Reasoning
description: Assesses how the candidate comprehends numerical information in various formats.

name: SHL Verify Interactive – Deductive Reasoning
description: Measures the ability to draw logical conclusions based on information provided, identify strengths and weaknesses of arguments, and complete scenarios using incomplete information.

name: SHL Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Evaluates ability to identify specific patterns in data or situations and generalize that information to broader contexts.

name: Dependability and Safety Instrument (DSI)
description: A short pre-screening tool for entry-level roles designed to identify potential employees who will have good dependability and reliability, less likely to engage in counter-productive work behaviors.

name: Graduate Scenarios
description: A test of Managerial Judgement for graduates with limited work experience; hypothetical scenarios with rated responses, used for recruitment, selection and development.

name: Management Scenarios
description: A test of Managerial Judgement measuring an individual's ability to decide effective ways of handling real-life situations, rated on a 6-point effectiveness scale.

name: Executive Scenarios
description: A test of Managerial Judgement designed to assess judgement in executives, using hypothetical scenarios rated for effectiveness of response.

name: Entry Level Sales Solution
description: For entry-level positions where employees proactively sell products or services to customers: promoting products, persuading customers, completing transactions.

name: Entry Level Customer Service (General) Solution
description: For entry-level positions requiring customer interaction: taking orders, solving product or service issues, responding to difficult or irate customers.

name: Sales & Service Phone Solution
description: Contact center simulation plus behavioral tests for roles involving sales or sales-related behaviors: recommending products, extending offers, handling objections.

name: Customer Service Phone Solution
description: Contact center simulation plus behavioral tests measuring a candidate's ability to listen, take ownership of issues, resolve issues, navigate systems and enter information accurately.

name: Contact Center Call Simulation (New)
description: Simulation-based test that measures the ability to handle customer concerns over a call by referring to standard process documents; also measures typing and documentation skills.

name: Conversational Multichat Simulation
description: Simulation-based test measuring the ability to handle customer concerns over multiple chats, scoring resolution, time taken and correct use of vocabulary and grammar.

name: HIPAA (Security)
description: Measures knowledge of compliance with standards required by the Security and Electronic Signature Standards as they apply to HIPAA for healthcare professionals.

name: Programming Concepts
description: Measures knowledge of core aspects of computer science programming valid across languages: algorithms, complex data types, data access, program flow and structure, programming paradigms, variables and operators.

name: Project Management (2013)
description: Measures knowledge of managing projects on time and within budget based on PMI's PMBOK methodology: communications, cost, HR, procurement, quality, risk, scope, stakeholder and time management.

name: Agile Software Development
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of agile methodology, scrum, feature driven development, incremental and iterative development processes.

name: Computer Science (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of operating systems, computer architecture, DBMS and basics of computer networks and communication.

name: Basic Computer Literacy (Windows 10) (New)
description: Measures knowledge of general computer terminology, processes, and applications and the ability to perform operations in a simulated environment: application software, computer terms, internet and email, managing files, operating system.

name: Cyber Risk (New)
description: Multi-choice test that measures knowledge of cyber risk management, system and application security, network security and security management.
